sync_type: Unidirectional (Salesforce → Mailchimp, typically via connector or middleware)
popularity: high — common setup: Salesforce as CRM of record + Mailchimp for email marketing automation

authentication_requirements.salesforce_side: OAuth 2.0 JWT Bearer flow. Dedicated integration user with API Enabled permission, Read on Contact, Lead, Campaign.
authentication_requirements.mailchimp_side: OAuth 2.0 or API Key. Audience manager permissions required for list/segment management.

common_use_cases: Sync Salesforce Leads/Contacts to Mailchimp audiences for email campaigns
Salesforce Campaign Members → Mailchimp segment/tag for targeted sends
Lead status changes trigger Mailchimp automation entry (e.g., new lead → welcome email)
Salesforce Opportunity won → Mailchimp list tag 'customer' + automation exit
Synced Salesforce reports with Mailchimp campaign performance metrics

salesforce_endpoints.purpose: SOQL to fetch recently modified records

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Salesforce Email field is the primary key in Mailchimp. If Email field not mapped or empty, sync silently fails.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Ensure Email field is mapped. Use Salesforce formula to coalesce fields: BLANKVALUE(Email, Alternate_Email__c). Set email as required on sync.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Salesforce sends a contact update for a person who unsubscribed in Mailchimp. Mailchimp re-subscribes them against their will. GDPR violation risk.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Do NOT sync status='subscribed' to Mailchimp if member status is 'unsubscribed' or 'cleaned'. Check Mailchimp member status before PATCH. Better: remove unsubscribed members from Salesforce sync list.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Salesforce date fields sent as full ISO timestamps; Mailchimp merge tags expect 'MM/DD/YYYY' or 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Number fields sent as strings.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Format dates as YYYY-MM-DD before sending to Mailchimp. Use NUMBER merge tag type for numeric fields. Test with one record first.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Free Mailchimp plan has 500 contacts limit. Syncing all Salesforce contacts exceeds this. Mailchimp rejects the batch.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Segment Salesforce contacts into a synced report that filters contacts to be within Mailchimp plan limit. Monitor audience size in Mailchimp dashboard.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Salesforce Campaign Members don't map 1:1 to Mailchimp segments/tags. A contact can be in multiple campaigns but Mailchimp tracking differs.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Use Mailchimp tags (not segments) to mirror campaign membership. Add/remove tags based on Campaign Member status.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Contact email changes in Salesforce. Mailchimp requires DELETE + re-POST to change subscriber email (PATCH doesn't allow email change).
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: On email change: DELETE old subscriber, POST new subscriber with new email. Preserve merge field data in migration.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Salesforce daily API call limit is consumed by Mailchimp sync plus all other integrations. High-volume sync exhausts allocation before end of day.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Use Salesforce CRON to schedule sync during off-peak hours. Use Bulk API 2.0 for large initial syncs. Set per-sync batch sizes to 200 records.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Integration user profile has Read on Contact but FLS on Email field is not visible. Sync sends empty email → Mailchimp rejects.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Verify FLS for integration user: Email, FirstName, LastName, and all mapped custom fields must be Read/Edit visible.

community_solutions.problem: Batch subscribe errors with 'member already exists'
community_solutions.solution: Use PUT (upsert) instead of POST for batch member operations. POST returns 400 if member exists.

community_solutions.problem: Field length limits in Mailchimp merge tags
community_solutions.solution: Mailchimp text merge tags max 255 characters. Salesforce long text fields must be truncated. Use Mailchimp address merge tag type for structured address data.

community_solutions.problem: Time zone differences in date sync
community_solutions.solution: Salesforce stores dates in UTC; Mailchimp uses account timezone. Convert to Mailchimp's timezone before sync.
